articles.title: Watch: Why is Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill so controversial?
articles.description: Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill, 2026 has sparked a major political and legal debate. The proposed law aims to prevent forced religious conversions through strict rules, including a 60-day prior notice and severe penalties. While the government says it protects vulnerable individuals, critics argue it could violate fundamental rights, enable misuse, and impact personal freedom and interfaith relationships. The bill has been passed in both houses.

articles.title: US Stock Market | Sticky inflation to keep rate cuts at bay: Andrew Freris
articles.description: Geopolitical tensions and volatile commodity markets are forcing investors to rethink traditional strategies, shifting focus from returns to resilience. Experts predict prolonged conflicts will drive structural changes in energy markets and favor defence stocks, while central banks remain cautious due to persistent inflation, limiting interest rate cuts.

dailyNews.title: Global Market Today | Asian stocks gain ahead of Fed rate decision, oil holds near $103

Continued volatility is expected until the energy situation stabilizes.

dailyNews.title: Kharg Island Is an Appealing Target for Trump, With High Risks
dailyNews.description: A U.S. attack or a move to seize control of Iran’s main oil export hub could cripple the country’s ability to profit from its natural resources. But it would also risk sending energy prices even higher.

dailyNews.title: No Trump Endorsement for Cornyn or Paxton in Texas Senate Race as Deadline Passes
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s decision not to weigh in before the deadline means both John Cornyn and Ken Paxton remain on the ballot, extending their costly and increasingly personal battle into a May runoff.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Newsom Shouldn’t Be President Because He Is Dyslexic
dailyNews.description: President Trump said “a president should not have learning disabilities,” prompting criticism from a group that advocates equal opportunities for people with learning disabilities.

dailyNews.title: Why Did Trump Officials Award $2 Million to a Small Art School in Queens?
dailyNews.description: The National Endowment for the Humanities seldom gave seven-figure grants. Now big awards flow to handpicked projects, including an institution with three full-time employees.

dailyNews.title: Cubans Want a Deal. Just Not This One.
dailyNews.description: Trump wants a symbolic win. Islanders want actual democracy.

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject President Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Senate votes to begin marathon debate over SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The Senate voted to begin a marathon debate on the SAVE America Act, an elections bill that President Trump has been pressing Republicans to pass.

dailyNews.title: See full results for 2026 Illinois primary elections
dailyNews.description: Candidates for governor, U.S. Senate, U.S. House, and Cook County Board President were among the races on the ballot in the 2026 Illinois primary election on Tuesday.

dailyNews.title: As Trump floats "taking Cuba," island's president warns of "resistance"
dailyNews.description: The leader of Cuba is vowing to put up "resistance" against the U.S. as President Trump suggests he may "take" the island nation, whose communist government has faced intense U.S. pressure and languished under energy shortages.
